news: Gilead completed acquisition of Arcellx for $7.8B, gaining full control of anito-cel CAR-T therapy for multiple myeloma.

changes.reason: Cash reduced by $7.8B acquisition cost

news: Ionis reported strong Q1 2026 revenue of $246M (+87% YoY) with TRYNGOLZA commercial momentum and raised olezarsen peak sales guidance to >$3B from >$2B.

changes.reason: Strong Q1 revenue performance ($246M run-rate) supports higher commercial revenue assumptions

news: Gilead received FDA priority review for BIC/LEN HIV treatment combination following positive Phase 3 data.

changes.reason: FDA priority review for BIC/LEN increases approval confidence for HIV treatment expansion, supporting lenacapavir franchise
Priority review designation further de-risks HIV treatment portfolio in upside scenario
Even in conservative scenario, priority review reduces regulatory risk for lenacapavir-based treatments

news: Intellia priced a public offering of 16.7M shares at $10.75, raising ~$180M gross proceeds following positive Phase 3 HAELO results and BLA initiation.

changes.reason: 16.7M new shares issued in public offering increases shares outstanding from 118M to ~135M
~$180M gross proceeds from offering increases cash position from $540M to ~$720M
14% dilution from equity raise increases base case dilution assumption from 10% to 15%
Bear case dilution increases from 20% to 25% reflecting actual dilutive financing event

news: FDA placed partial clinical hold on PGN-EDODM1 for myotonic dystrophy type 1, affecting the FREEDOM2-DM1 trial, with shares falling 21%.

Reduced likelihood of base case success given regulatory setback
Lower probability of optimal outcomes with FDA hold in place
Acquisition scenario much less likely with regulatory uncertainty
